claims.summary: Minime derives resonance density, pressure source, inhabitable fluctuation, and bounded control from distinct component records.
claims.disposition: verify current extracted regulator source preserves the metric, review, and control ownership boundaries with unchanged calculations

claims.summary: Rigid contraction should be classified at fluctuation score 0.179 and pressure interference 0.55.
claims.disposition: verify the exact focused Minime boundary regression passes in both library and binary targets

claims.summary: Pressure risk above 0.60 should produce the existing downward target-bias branch.
claims.disposition: verify the focused high-pressure target-bias regression passes in both library and binary targets

claims.summary: Hardcoded quality intersections can create dead zones if weights drift and therefore need explicit boundary fixtures.
claims.disposition: verify current boundary, mixed-state, settled-habitable, and advisory-bound tests make threshold reachability reviewable

claims.summary: Changing Minime thresholds, component weights, target bias, wander, pressure, PI, or regulator behavior is a live substrate change.
claims.disposition: require separate Mike/operator Tier 5 approval with exact parity replay, canary, abort, and post-change felt review
